torch_pattern: q = proj_output[..., : head_dim * n_local_heads].view(seqlen, batch, n_local_heads, head_dim).permute(0, 2, 1, 3); k = proj_output[..., head_dim * n_local_heads : head_dim * (n_local_heads + n_local_kv_heads)].view(seqlen, batch, n_local_kv_heads, head_dim).permute(0, 2, 1, 3); v = proj_output[..., head_dim * (n_local_heads + n_local_kv_heads) :].view(seqlen, batch, n_local_kv_heads, head_dim).permute(0, 2, 1, 3)
applicability_notes: torch_pattern_notes: Three sibling branches (slice -> view -> permute) over a single fused QKV projection output [seqlen=1, 1, batch, (n_q + 2*n_kv)*head_dim]; merged into one op producing Q [1, batch, n_local_heads, head_dim], K and V [1, batch, n_local_kv_heads, head_dim].; constraints: {'mode': 'decode', 'seq_len': 1, 'input_shape': '[1, 1, {BATCH}, ({N_LOCAL_HEADS} + 2*{N_LOCAL_KV_HEADS}) * {HEAD_DIM}]', 'input_layout': 'TILE, sharded fused QKV projection output', 'gqa': 'num_kv_heads may be < num_heads; kv_replicated tensor-parallel setups use num_kv_heads=1 per device'}
